text: The headline must stop the scroll without misleading the offer.
Specificity beats cleverness: numbers, timeframes, and named outcomes.
Fair use in advertising is narrow; assume you need license for recognizable assets.
Disclaimers must be proximate to the claim they qualify, not buried in footer.
Post-purchase email within 24h sets retention trajectory.
Define the buyer's anxious question before writing a single line of copy.
Scale only after stable CPA over 7-day window; variance kills ROAS.
Stack value visibly; the anchor price frames the deal.
